productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Red Polo T-Shirt
description: Red knitted polo T-shirt, has a contrast ribbed polo collar, a short button placket on the front, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and striped detail, an embroidered branding on the left side of the chest and an applique detail on the right side of the chest and on the back, a vented hem with the back longer than the front
